FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Stores a fast string version of the Git hash for flags.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Improves the speed of retrieving flag information for players.

DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.mechanism: Uses a dynamic string to track the timestamp of when a flag was flipped.
DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.purpose: Allows players to see the most recent changes to flags in real-time.

DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.mechanism: Maintains a dynamic string representation of the Git hash for flags.
DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.purpose: Ensures players have access to the latest flag versions and updates.

FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Stores a fast string version of the timestamp when a flag is flipped.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Enhances performance by quickly providing players with the last flip time of flags.
